creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repocopy in the following order:

1. Repocopy sysutils/syslog-ng to sysutils/syslog-ng1.
2. Delete the original sysutils/syslog-ng directory tree, then,
3. Repocopy sysutils/syslog-ng3 to sysutils/syslog-ng (replaces syslog-ng in
   step 1).
4. Repocopy sysutils/syslog-ng3-devel to sysutils/syslog-ng-devel.

I will then take care of the following:

1. Forced commit to document the move of sysutils/syslog-ng to syslog-ng1.
2. Forced commit to document the move of sysutils/syslog-ng3 to syslog-ng.
3. Forced commit to document the move of sysutils/syslog-ng3-devel to
   syslog-ng-devel.
4. Deprecate sysutils/syslog-ng1 to expire a month from now.
5. Deprecate sysutils/syslog-ng2 to expire a year from now.

This has been discussed in private emails cc'd to portmgr@.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: N/A
